title: MT❯iplus Bolsters Immigration Law Expertise With Additions of Chantal Arsenault, Christine Beltempo
content:
## MT❯iplus Bolsters Immigration Law Expertise With Additions of Chantal Arsenault, Christine Beltempo
August 21, 2023 - MT❯i plus , a Division of McCarthy Tétrault, has bolstered its immigration law practice with the additions of seasoned practitioners Chantal Arsenault and Christine Beltempo , and six new paralegals. These strategic additions position us well to continue meeting the evolving and complex immigration needs of clients operating in the current dynamic global marketplace.
Chantal, a partner based in Montréal, brings nearly 30 years of experience helping clients shape their workforce strategies and turn immigration into a talent driver. Chantal advises small- and medium-sized companies as well as large international corporations in both Canada and the U.S. on bringing foreign workers to Canada. She has particular experience in the technology, entertainment, sports, food service, pharmaceutical and manufacturing industries. She has been repeatedly recognized for her immigration law expertise in Chambers Canada , Chambers Global , The Canadian Legal Lexpert Directory , Who’s Who Legal and more.
Christine is a counsel in Montréal whose practice focuses on the areas of business immigration and international mobility. She has nearly 10 years of experience helping small- and mid-sized companies as well as large international corporations bring temporary workers to Canada and find solutions to deal with labour shortages.
“In the highly competitive global talent market, talent sourcing and migration have become vital to companies’ strategies in driving success,” says Stéphane Duval , leader of the firm’s National Immigration Law Practice . “Now more than ever, clients need access to strategic advisors who can support their immigration needs from end to end in order to remain competitive. Chantal, Christine and our six new paralegals are part of a strategic expansion for our immigration law practice and will be invaluable to clients looking to acquire or move talent.”
MT ❯ iplus provides an effective approach to address the complex immigration needs of clients operating in the current global marketplace. The evolution of McCarthy Tétrault’s Immigration Law Practice to the MT ❯ iplus platform combines the firm’s longstanding experience and excellence around immigration law with new technologies to enhance efficiencies. Our team delivers better results while keeping our distinct personal approach. Learn how our team can help you achieve your business objectives.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information on McCarthy Tétrault or any of the above, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
